steps.text: The clock shows lunchtime. What comes after lunch?
steps.feedback: That is right — after lunch comes afternoon! Lunch, then afternoon.

steps.text: Now the clock shows afternoon. What comes after afternoon?
steps.feedback: After afternoon comes dinner time. The day is nearly done!

steps.text: The clock shows breakfast. What comes after breakfast?
steps.feedback: After breakfast comes lunch! First breakfast, then lunch.
